title: Arundinaria suwekoana
taxonomy: Arundinaria suwekoana is a species of bamboo that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is classified as a member of the subfamily Bambusoideae and the genus Arundinaria. Further classification places it within the tribe Bambuseae and the subtribe Bambusinae. The species is native to Indonesia and is known for its distinctive characteristics and growth habits. Arundinaria suwekoana's classification is primarily based on its botanical features and morphological characteristics.
uses: Arundinaria suwekoana is a type of bamboo, but specific information about its medicinal uses is not readily available.
